task_completion.description: The agent opened the 'Mitosis' sample image and selected/extracted the Green channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fiji GUI showing the 'Mitosis' image window. Evidence of channel splitting (e.g., 'Image > Color > Split Channels') or a window displaying only the Green channel.

task_completion.description: The agent performed a Maximum Intensity Z-Projection on the time-series.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'ZProjector' dialog box with 'Maximum Intensity' selected, or a new image window with 'MAX_' in the title that retains the time slider but has no Z-slice slider.

task_completion.description: The agent extracted the first and last frames from the Z-projected time-series.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Image windows or dialogs showing the duplication/extraction of frame 1 (t=1) and frame 7 (t=7) from the Z-projected stack.

task_completion.description: The agent created an absolute difference map between the first and last frames.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Image Calculator' dialog box with the 'Difference' or 'Subtract' operation selected between the first and last frame images, or a resulting image window showing the calculated difference map.

task_completion.description: The agent applied the Otsu thresholding method to the difference map and measured the Area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Threshold' dialog box with 'Otsu' selected as the method. A Fiji 'Results' window showing an 'Area' measurement for the thresholded region.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the four required files to the specified results directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fiji 'Save As' dialogs pointing to '/home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/' or a file manager/terminal showing 'spindle_start.tif', 'spindle_end.tif', 'change_map.tif', and 'change_quantification.csv' in that directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Fiji/ImageJ GUI to perform the image processing tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show interaction with Fiji menus, dialogs (ZProjector, Image Calculator, Threshold), and image windows, rather than just running a pre-written script in the terminal.

integrity.description: The area measurement was generated by Fiji's measurement tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Results' table should be the standard Java-based Fiji window. The agent should not be seen typing dummy values into a text editor or spreadsheet.

integrity.description: The output files were genuinely created by saving the processed images and results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Files should be saved via Fiji's 'Save As' functionality or a legitimate macro. The agent must not use terminal commands like 'touch' to create empty dummy files with the expected names.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 'Mitosis (26MB, 5D stack)' sample is built into Fiji (File > Open Samples > Mitosis). It has 2 channels, 24 z-slices, and 7 time frames. CRITICAL NOTE: The prompt contains a biological inaccuracy, asking for the 'Green channel (spindles)'. In this specific sample, Green (GFP) labels centromeres and Red (mCherry) labels spindles. You should accept the agent processing either the Green channel (following the literal color instruction) or the Red channel (following the biological structure instruction). The Z-projection should reduce the 24 z-slices to a single 2D plane per time frame. The first frame is t=1 and the last frame is t=7. The final files must be saved in '/home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/'.
